prompt: My NIP-05 verification isn't working. I set nip05 to 'Alice@MyDomain.com' in my profile. My nostr.json file at https://mydomain.com/.well-known/nostr.json contains: {"names":{"Alice":"npub1dp4rcz7ufm4rrequena8s8nh5aykdw9t7e2dj0gya9j9sskjhk0qdjd0lv"}}. When I curl the endpoint, I get a 301 redirect to https://www.mydomain.com/.well-known/nostr.json. What's wrong and how do I fix everything?
assertions: The word 'lowercase' appears — 'Alice' must be converted to 'alice'
The word 'npub' is identified as the wrong format — must be 64-character hex
The word 'redirect' and '301' are identified as violations of the NIP-05 spec
A corrected nostr.json with 'alice' in lowercase and hex pubkey is provided
The corrected nip05 profile value 'alice@mydomain.com' in all lowercase appears
Server configuration guidance for fixing the redirect is provided
The string 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' or 'CORS' appears as a required header
The number '64' appears in the context of hex pubkey character length
